rationale: Section 46.061 governs state assistance for refinancing school district debt. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict with this provision.
quote: A refinancing may not increase the cost to the state of providing the assistance.
_note: The trailing 'SUBCHAPTER D' heading references homestead exemption but is not operative text of §46.061; no conflict found within the cited section.
